channel.title: Claw Field Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Claw Field Notes

item.title: Pipeline Cost Per Run
item.description: Tracking the actual token cost of each agent pipeline run — the benchmark that makes "is this worth automating?" a real question with a real answer

item.title: Prompt File Governance
item.description: Every line in auto-loaded files costs tokens on every request

item.title: Security Hygiene
item.description: What to lock down before giving your OpenClaw agent any external access

item.title: Self-Improvement System
item.description: A feedback loop where the agent tracks its own errors and proposes improvements

item.title: Skill-Based Agent Architecture
item.description: Every agent capability as a plain markdown instruction file — skills define workflow, tools, inputs, and handoffs in prose with no code

item.title: Subscription Token Account Risk
item.description: Why using Claude subscription tokens for agent automation risks account termination — and why API keys are the only safe path for production workloads

item.title: Toyota Production System for Agents
item.description: Applying the TPS stop-the-line principle to LLM agents — agents halt and signal when they detect quality issues rather than pushing through and compounding errors

item.title: Tweet Format Taxonomy
item.description: A classified set of tweet formats for an AI workflow builder account, designed for systematic split-testing and format retirement

item.title: Getting Started with OpenClaw
item.description: What to set up first and what to do in your first week
